evidence.recommended_verification_command: cd ~/Documents/itheia-llm && python3 -c "import chromadb; c=chromadb.PersistentClient(path='site_kb_chromadb'); col=c.get_collection('lariel_site_kb'); print({'collection': col.name, 'count': col.count()})"
evidence.mismatch_explanation: Two separate Flask services were observed: server.py uses chromadb_data (collection itheia_manual), while site_kb_server.py uses site_kb_chromadb (collection lariel_site_kb). /health on port 8091 maps to site_kb_server.py and therefore reports lariel_site_kb with 49 docs.
